name: 31" Geller Modern Counter Height Barstool with Footrest Gray Boucle - Threshold™
description:
Add a modern seating option to your kitchen or bar counter with the Geller Modern Counter-Height Barstool from Threshold™. Set on a wooden frame with slanted legs and a footrest, this counter-height barstool features an armless design for a boost of style. The soft fabric upholstery makes this Milano elephant barstool comfy to sit on, and it pairs well with a variety of decor styles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 20 Inches
Overall Height: 43 Inches
Overall Depth: 22 Inches
